_readme: F5-TTS recipe for Stage H (voice cloning path).
1. Load your F5-TTS graph in ComfyUI and do Workflow -> Export (API Format).
2. Replace this file with that export.
3. In archviz_director.py ComfyClient, set f5_nodes to match your node IDs:
'text':      '<node_id of the text input or primitive>',
The controller patches: text -> audio_prompt text, ref_audio -> uploaded voice ref.

1._comment: PATCH TARGET: ref_audio node. Controller uploads voice_ref.wav here.

inputs.gen_text: Placeholder. Controller patches this with the audio_prompt.

2._comment: PATCH TARGET: text node. Controller sets gen_text to audio_prompt.

3._comment: PATCH TARGET: save node. Controller sets filename_prefix to scene id.
